title: HTTP APIs and Channels
description: Build a channel component that exposes HTTP endpoints and feeds input into the reactive system.
channels_desc: A channel is a component that starts an HTTP server on mount and stops it on cleanup. Incoming requests call callback props, which update signals and trigger downstream components.
http_server_intro: The Channel component starts a Hono server inside onMount. Route handlers are passed in as props. onCleanup shuts down the server when the component is removed.
reactive_flow_intro: The channel's callback props call setSites, setPendingGeneration, and other setters. Those signal updates trigger effects and Show/For components downstream.
info_cleanup: The onCleanup callback releases the port when the component is removed or the app stops.
